# New Epics to Implement

## Universe Sort No Longer Sticky

On the universe, I can sort correctly, but the sort order should still be available when I leave and come back to the universe (refresh the screen). This was working prior to fixing the secondary sort order in Epic 43, but it seems to have been lost in the process. This is a regression that needs to be addressed.

Let's make sure we have an e2e test case that covers this functionality to prevent future regressions.

Use the Playwright MCP server to verify this works correctly when you think you have a solution.

## Duplicate Symbols on the Universe Screen

When I list the universe rows in Avg Purch Yield % descending order, I see duplicate symbols. This happens in other sort orders as well but is easiest to see in this one. This may be related to the next one.

Let's make sure we have an e2e test case that covers this functionality to prevent future regressions.

Use the Playwright MCP server to verify this works correctly when you think you have a solution.

## Universe Symbol Descending Sort Not Loading

When I sort the universe by Symbol in ascending order, the first visible rows appear to be empty. But when I scroll down, and back up, they populate. I suspect the issue has to do with signals not refreshing properly when the index has an ID.

This may be related to the previous one.

Let's make sure we have an e2e test case that covers this functionality to prevent future regressions.

Use the Playwright MCP server to verify this works correctly when you think you have a solution.

## Imports Still Not Handling Splits

We were supposed to have fixed splits in Epic 48, but I don't see any evidence that ANY work was done to address this.

Here are a few more examples of rows in the CSV that are not bing handled.  The split, you will see, is recorded in pairs but I think we only need the first one so we can compute the ratio, determine what account is impacted, they symbol, and the ratio of the split:
Dec-8-2025,REVERSE SPLIT R/S FROM 88634T493#REOR M0051704770001,MSTY,80,--,--,"+2,637.48",TIDAL TRUST II YIELDMAX MSTR OP,--,--,Joint Brokerage *4767
Dec-8-2025,REVERSE SPLIT R/S TO 88636X732#REOR M0051704770000,88634T493,-400,--,--,"+2,637.48",TIDAL TR II YIELDMAX MSTR OP 1 FOR 5 R/S INTO TIDAL TRUST II YIELDMAX MSTR OPT INCOME STRATGY ETF,--,--,Joint Brokerage *4767

Dec-1-2025,REVERSE SPLIT R/S FROM 88636J527#REOR M0051702900001,ULTY,100,--,--,"+1,697.07",TIDAL TRUST II YIELDMAX ULTRA O,--,--,Joint Brokerage *4767
Dec-1-2025,REVERSE SPLIT R/S TO 88636X708#REOR M0051702900000,88636J527,"-1,000",--,--,"+1,697.07",TIDAL TRUST II YIELDMAX ULTRA OPT INCM STRGY ETF 1 FOR 10 R/S INTO TIDAL TRUST II YIELDMAX ULT

Sep-8-2025,REVERSE SPLIT R/S FROM 691543102#REOR M0051680750001,OXLC,306,--,--,"+3,672.63",OXFORD LANE CAP CORP COM,--,--,Joint Brokerage *4767
Sep-8-2025,REVERSE SPLIT R/S TO 691543847#REOR M0051680750000,691543102,"-1,530",--,--,"+3,672.63",OXFORD LANE CAPITAL CORP 1 FOR 5 R/S INTO OXFORD LANE CAPITAL CORP COM USD0.01 CUSIP
